title: Snapshot changelog and comparison
summary: EVE can generate release notes from snapshot history and compare two product states across user-visible changes, decisions, risks, validation, and timeline entries.
userVisibleChange: Added snapshot-based changelog generation and product-state comparison in the CLI and local UI.

risks.title: Comparison output is product-level only and intentionally does not replace Git diffs.

decisions.title: Reuse existing snapshot records and repository APIs without changing the snapshot schema.
